item.name: Authentication
item.description: General countries endpoints for the registration process.

request.description:
Retrieve a list of all supported countries with their dial codes,
phone number formats, and base64 encoded flags.

Begin registration by sending a 6-digit verification code to the given email address.
The user's full name, phone number and email are collected upfront. Once the OTP is verified,
the account is created automatically. Fails if an account with the email already exists.

response.body: {"event":"default","status":"success","message":"A verification code has been sent to your email.","data":{"signature":"$2y$12$exampleSignatureHash","expiration":10},"errors":null}
response.name: OTP sent

response.body: {"event":"default","status":"failed","message":"You must wait before requesting another OTP.","data":null,"errors":[]}
response.name: Throttled

response.body: {"event":"default","status":"failed","message":"An account with this email already exists.","data":null,"errors":[]}
response.name: Email taken

request.description:
Validate the 6-digit code sent during registration. On success, creates the
user account and returns an authenticated user with a Sanctum API token.

response.body: {"event":"default","status":"failed","message":"An account with this email already exists.","data":null,"errors":[]}
response.name: Email taken

request.description: Resend the 6-digit verification code for a pending registration.

response.body: {"event":"default","status":"success","message":"A new verification code has been sent to your email.","data":{"signature":"$2y$12$exampleSignatureHash","expiration":10},"errors":null}
response.name: OTP resent

response.body: {"event":"default","status":"failed","message":"No pending verification found. Please register again.","data":null,"errors":[]}
response.name: No pending OTP

response.body: {"event":"default","status":"failed","message":"You must wait before requesting another OTP.","data":null,"errors":[]}
response.name: Throttled

request.description: Begin login by sending a 6-digit verification code to an existing user's email address.

response.body: {"event":"default","status":"success","message":"A login code has been sent to your email.","data":{"signature":"$2y$12$exampleSignatureHash","expiration":10},"errors":null}
response.name: OTP sent

response.body: {"event":"default","status":"failed","message":"You must wait before requesting another OTP.","data":null,"errors":[]}
response.name: Throttled

request.description:
Validate the 6-digit login code. Returns the authenticated user and a
Sanctum API token on success.
Resend the 6-digit login code for a pending login attempt.

response.body: {"event":"default","status":"success","message":"A new login code has been sent to your email.","data":{"signature":"$2y$12$exampleSignatureHash","expiration":10},"errors":null}
response.name: OTP resent

response.body: {"event":"default","status":"failed","message":"No pending login code found. Please try logging in again.","data":null,"errors":[]}
response.name: No pending OTP

response.body: {"event":"default","status":"failed","message":"You must wait before requesting another OTP.","data":null,"errors":[]}
response.name: Throttled

request.description:
Revoke the current API token. The token used to authenticate this
request will no longer be valid.

Retrieve the single active visible poll for the current season, including all options with
weighted vote counts and percentages. Returns null data when no active season or visible poll exists.

response.body: {"event":"default","status":"success","message":"Poll retrieved.","data":{"uid":"01jw...","question":"Who do you want to see shine this week?","description":"Cast your vote for your favourite artist.","total_votes":133500,"total_votes_description":"5 points accumulated for this poll","status":"active","has_ended":false,"time_left":"4 days left","ends_at":"2026-05-27T00:00:00.000000Z","has_voted":false,"voted_option_uid":null,"options":[{"uid":"01jw...","name":"Contestant Publicity","votes_count":77330,"percentage":58.0}]},"errors":null}
response.name: Poll retrieved

request.description:
Cast a vote on the specified poll. Each user may only vote once per poll.
The vote weight is automatically determined by the user's active subscription plan perk.

response.body: {"event":"default","status":"success","message":"Vote submitted.","data":{"uid":"01jw...","question":"Who do you want to see shine this week?","description":"Cast your vote for your favourite artist.","total_votes":133501,"status":"active","has_ended":false,"time_left":"4 days left","ends_at":"2026-05-27T00:00:00.000000Z","has_voted":true,"voted_option_uid":"01jw...","options":[{"uid":"01jw...","name":"Contestant Publicity","votes_count":77331,"percentage":58.0}]},"errors":null}
response.name: Vote submitted

response.body: {"event":"default","status":"failed","message":"You have already voted on this poll.","data":null,"errors":[]}
response.name: Already voted

request.description: Return the currently authenticated user's profile.

Retrieve all active subscription plans along with their pricing, features, perks, and permissions.
